title: Ore Stars
description: A ingredient mod to add to modpacks and other uses
body:
# Ore Stars Mod

This Mod add's the Vanilla Ore as Nether Star likes Called ore Stars for modpack devs to use use on their packs as recipe item's or whatnot.

The Current Star's:
- Iron Star
- Coal Star
- Gold Star
- Diamond Star
- Lapis Star
- Emerald Star
- Redstone Star
- Copper Star
- Quartz Star
- Netherite Star
- Amethyst Star

If you have any issues on the mod with you pack please reach out via github issues.

The mod is both forge and fabric combined and for fabric you do need FabricApi

Anyone is welcome to use the mod as long as Credit is shown to me and my friends since we worked hard on this
